item.title:
Palestine_UN: Thomas Niblock reposteó State of Palestine @Palestine_UN · 17h Hebron, Palestine
Pietro Masturzo Cita L'Espresso @espr
item.description:
Thomas Niblock reposteó State of Palestine @Palestine_UN · 17h Hebron, Palestine
Pietro Masturzo Cita L'Espresso @espressonline · 21h Traducido del italiano La anexión de Cisjordania, con soldados cómplices de los colonos. Gaza aniquilada. El avance en Líbano. La frontera violada en Siria. La guerra contra Irán. Limpieza étnica y masacres. Así la derecha sionista da forma al Gran Israel
El número de L’Espresso, en quioscos y en la 300 9 mil 54 mil 1 M

item.title: CahairOKane1: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 9h This is the game-defining kickout I keep talking about. Highlighted the numbers to illu
item.description: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 9h This is the game-defining kickout I keep talking about. Highlighted the numbers to illustrate the point. Armagh could so easily have stepped off it a man light. Pressed up, really organised, talking, everyone sure of their job against Tyrone’s bunch & break routine. Massive. 1 54 10 mil

item.title:
CahairOKane1: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 10h “It wasn’t sitting well with them, getting some of the criticism we were getting.”
Ty
item.description:
Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 10h “It wasn’t sitting well with them, getting some of the criticism we were getting.”
Tyrone boss Malachy O’Rourke speaks about the critics and their struggle to get hands on the ball in extra-time after the game yesterday 10 5 mil
